summary: A hissy matrix SBD with mixed audio opinions but a memorable Spanish‑flavored ending to Crazy Fingers.
review: The recording is a soundboard‑plus‑audience (matrix) source that some listeners find noisy and hissy, while others appreciate the added crowd energy and bass. Musically the only specific highlight mentioned is a quick Spanish flair at the end of "Crazy Fingers," suggesting a fun moment in the performance despite limited commentary on the overall show.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviewers are split on recording quality (2‑5 stars) and give only a single positive song comment, leading to an average rating that reflects decent but not outstanding show and fair technical quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as hissy with noticeable audience mic bleed; some reviewers note it lacks the clarity of pure soundboard sources, while others like the added crowd cheer and perceived extra bass.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set pacing; reviewers focus mainly on a single song highlight.
